series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency (Director, Chief, Secretary, Commissioner, and their deputies), dealing with all aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program,
retention_statement: Paper: Retain four years. Review by State Archives for possible transfer. Destroy if of no historical value to State Archives.

series_title: GAF-84 Revenue Receipts and Holding Acco
series_description: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribu- tion. Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unknown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established a departmental holding fund fr
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Represents an agency's intent to purchase goods and/or services; it reserves appropriation funds for future spending until the funds are formally obligated (encumbered).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: (Central Office Supply Order Form) May encumber funds for purchases from other state agencies that involve procurement of supplies, equimpent, or standard forms.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_title: Official Register of Licensees by Licens
series_description: Provides name, address, business address, and license status for each licensed or permit holding therapist. Register is finalized at the end of every licensing year. New copy is ran each quarter for updated information.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy all precceding quarterly registers for each licensing year. Retain final register in office for five years

series_description: Cooperative Agreements, accreditation standards, applications for recognition and supplemental documents, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year after termination of recognition or rescission of cooperative agreement

series_description: Transcripts of Public Hearings
retention_statement: Paper: Please change retention period to read: Retain in office for five years

series_title: File of Licensed Resiratory Care Provide
series_description: Contains all originall applications for license or permit, supporting documentation, copy of license certificate, address and phone number. File also contains Board Correspondence to and from respiratory care providers. Also, copies of adjudication order and opportunity for hearing notices
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 years, or until notification of death of licensee, which ever occurs first ; Electronic: Retain 60 years, or until notification of death of licensee, whichever occurs first

series_description: Results of criminal records checks conducted by Ohio BCI &I and the FBI for license and limited permit applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: For "No records" identified criminal background checks, record that record was received and

series_title: Incomplete initial applications for licenses, certificates of registration or limited permits
series_description: Record series includes original applications, supporting documents, copies of certificates of completion, correspondence, transcripts, or other documents filed by persons or entities in association with an initial application, but abandoned as incomplete following notification pursuant to OAC 4761:1-5-03, 4761:1-6-04, and 4761-5-04.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year following final notice of abandonment. ; Electronic: Retain for one year following final notice of abandonment.

series_description: Record series contain electronic mail correspondence, including attachments sent and received by the Ohio Respiratory Care Board. Series does not include Executive Electronic Correspondence dealing with significant aspects of the administration of the agency (policies, procedures, program, fiscal or personnel matters).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year

series_title: Home Medical Equipment Facility Position Descriptions or Proof of Employee Training
series_description: Record series contain Postion Descriptions and proof of employee training for intial home medical equipment license or certificate of registration applications filed between 07/01/2005 and 03/31/2008. Requirement to file Postion Descriptions and proof of employee training was rescinded from OAC 4761:1-5-02 and 4761:1-6-02.
retention_statement: Paper: Dispose of following approval date of recrods retention schedule.

series_description: Electronic Data file containing personal information on licensees and limited permit holders. Data contains name address, birth date, social security number, license issuance records, educational background, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Data converted to elicense database in 2004. Retain until effective date of retention schedule.

series_title: Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank Adverse Action Reports
series_description: Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank Adverse Action Report is a confidential document created by the Healthcare Integrity and Protection Data Bank when an adverse action is reported involving a licensed entity. The report includes the identification of the individual,contains sensitive data, and the details of specific actions taken by the agency against the licensed entity.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three months after final report is cleared by HIPDB. ; Electronic: Retain for three months after final report is cleared by HIPDB.

series_description: To renew respiratory care license or limited permit on annual basis. Renewal I.D. card number is recorded on this application upon issuance.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for two calendar years

series_description: Respiratory Care providers are required to complete a set amount of continuing education. When requested, copies of completion certificates are sent to the Board for compliance verification. Record is retained in license files.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for a period of two calendar years

series_description: Test results for applicants that attempt the entry level respiratory care examination for Ohio licensure. Candidates have no limits regarding the number of times exam is taken.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 60 years or until notification of death ; Electronic: Retain 60 years or until notification of death

series_description: Provides name, address. and phone number for potential employees. It also provides previous, business addresses, and resumes for a person seeking employment with our agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 6 months after job posting

series_description: Consists of complaint forms used to file complaints against licensees and non-licensed persons, along with investigative reports, notes, statements, and evidence, including exhibits submitted at hearing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for a period of three years. If complaints are non-chargeable or unfounded

series_description: Documents pertaining to Board Meetings and related exhibits, including an outline of the agenda; journal entries; administrative and rules hearings reports & recommendations and final orders; approved notices of opportunity for hearing; signed consent agreements; minutes of Board committee meetings with hand-out materials, Board meeting guest lists; administrative report to the Board [which may include, but is not limited to: the Monthly Fiscal Report, List of Presentations, List of Continuing Education of Staff Training, Licensure Statistics Sheet, Records, Hearing Unit Administrative Report, Website Volume Statistics, etc.]; and exhibits from Board meetings [if noted in the minutes that the exhibit will be included in the Journal].
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronically scanned and converted to CDROM readable format and microfilmed per American National Standards ; Microform: Retain Microfilm use copy until unusable. Create new copy from Master copy retained by agency. ; Electronic: Retain CDROM version permanently. Update copy as required and transition to new formats as technology changes require.
disposition: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Archives ; Electronic: Permanent

series_description: Series contains Journal Entries (Orders) and Consent Agreements prior to August 2007.
retention_statement: Paper: Paper: Retain until scanned to machine readable format, reviewed for accuracy and completeness, and saved to CDROM . ; Electronic: Retain CDROM permanently as part of the Board''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s official journal and business records. Retain permanently and transition to new electronic format as technology requires.

series_description: Record series contains internal information on administrative hearing outcomes used to track and verify reporting requirements to various databases (federal, state, national board). Information contained in record contains licensee identification, address, license no., administrative hearing outcomes, and social security number.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six months following latest signature date on form.

series_title: Records of Licensed or Registered HME facilities
series_description: Original Applications, supporting documents, insurance certificates copy of certificates, final inspection reports and compliance response letters with documentation, correspondence, copies of adjudication orders, copies of consent agreements, copies of opportunity for hearing notices.
retention_statement: Electronic: Two years following notification of closure of facility ; Paper: Two years following notification of closure of facility or until scanned as machine readable

series_description: Documents filed by applicants for respiratory care or home medical equipment licenses, limited permits or home medical equipment certificates of registration, but not associated with an actual application or duplicate documents filed by applicants for respiratory care or home medical equipment licenses, limited permits or home medical equipment certificates of registration. Includes: verification of licensure records from other states, transcripts, national board for respiratory care (NBRC) verification letters, continuing education certificates, certificates of insurance, and other associated records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year following receipt or for duplicate documents, after verification that original is on file.

series_description: Series includes supporting documentation for final determination of inspection results. Proof of meeting standards under OAC 4761:1-9.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing the inspection, unless the inspections results lead to the issuance of an Opportunity for Hearing under ORC 119. ; Electronic: Retain for six months following final determination of licensed HME facility passing the inspection, unless the inspections results lead to the issuance of an Opportunity for Hearing under ORC 119.

series_title: Records of Licensed Respiratory Care Professionals
series_description: Original Applications, reinstatement applications, supporting documents, copy of certificate, correspondence, orders, hearing notices.
retention_statement: Paper: 60 years or until electronically scanned ; Electronic: 60 years. Convert to new machine readable format if software requirements change.

series_description: Record series includes inspection reports filed by agency contract inspectors on specifically assigned licensed home medical equipment providers (includes full inspection report filed, correspondence generated by the agency to document deficient standards, documentation filed by licensee to address deficient standards and agency''s response letter to final inspection).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until licensed provider is re-surveyed and final inspection findings report is filed or until two years after expiration date of license, which ever occurs first.

series_title: Home Medical Equipment Inspector Invoices for Services rendered
series_description: Record series includes invoices for services filed with the Board by contract inspectors.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released and all discrepancies have been resolved

series_description: Records include daily and monthly access logs for staff accessing paper files or electronic records containing non-public personal information or confidential personal information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by the Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released and all discrepancies have been resolved

series_description: Record series includes budget proposal prepared by agency and filed with the Office of Budget and Management each biennium.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report released

series_description: Documentation includes requests for public records, public records receipt and response log, and copies of specific records provided.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years or until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for two years or until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later.

series_description: Includes public records comprised of internally generated correspondence (letters, memorandums) in paper or electronic format; and correspondence from the general public and/or licensees/registrants requesting information pertaining to the Board, application requirements, laws and rules, or other notifications or other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year, unless correspondence has administrative, legal, historical value, or is defined as Executive Correspondence that deals with significant aspects of the administration of the agency (i.e. seeks to establish board policy or procedure, programs, fiscal, or personnel matters). ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year, unless correspondence has administrative, legal, historical value, or is defined as Executive Correspondence that deals with significant aspects of the administration of the agency (i.e. seeks to establish board policy or procedure, programs, fiscal, or personnel matters).

series_description: Also includes other published periodic reports on agency activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Official minutes, orders and directives of a state agency, commission, board, or council.
retention_statement: Paper: As of 1/19/2018, all minutes of official RCB meetings are on record at State Archives.

series_description: A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded by a revised retention schedule, or until record series in no longer created

series_description: Pass and Fail lists for each candidate.
retention_statement: Paper: 4 years or until saved in a digital format ; Electronic: 4 years

series_description: General ledger records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: All records which document or are the basis for a payroll including time reports, activity sheets, time cards, overtime, com- pensation time, flextime authorizations, and leave requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. Destroy if of no historical value to State Archives.

series_description: Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released.

series_description: Used to encumber funds to order supplies and/or services from vendors and may be used to encumber funds for a purchase from another state agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and closeout audit report is released.

series_description: Record series includes revenue reconciliation lists for renewal applications received and uploaded into licensing system, electronic payment reports generated by agency for reconciliation, and lockbox transfer payment documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Destroy provided audited by Auditor of State and closeout audit report is released.

series_description: APPLICATION AND AFFIDAVAT FOR REPLACEMENT OF WARRANTS LOST, STOLEN, OR DESTROYED: Used when payee has received a warrant and it has been lost, stolen, or destroyed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Used to submit specifications for a printing job to State Printing and to encumber the dollars needed for the job.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and final audit report is released.

series_description: Includes mailing lists, directories, rosters, and registers compiled by an agency.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 4 years

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal intrepreations and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years, or until audited by the Auditor of State and audit report is released

series_description: Used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to an approved records retention schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five years

series_description: Requests for brochures, maps, and other free publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by stand- ard form letters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one year
